Announcement.text: Infloura 1.0 is live! Start treating your audience like a business.

Landing.heroTitle2: Simulate how much you can earn
Landing.featuresSub: Stop relying on hope. Start treating your audience like the business it is.
Landing.feat1Desc: See your income potential with mathematical precision across YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and X.
Landing.feat2Desc: Get a month-by-month roadmap from an AI model trained on creator economics and growth tactics.
Landing.feat3Desc: Compare your planned projections vs reality, stay on course, and adjust your actions instantly.
Landing.how1Desc: No API connections required initially. Just drop your current reach and engagement.
Landing.how2Desc: Our deterministic math engine creates 12-month projections tailored to your niche.
Landing.how3Desc: Execute the exact month-by-month steps the AI prescribes to hit your numbers.
Landing.faq1A: No. Infloura is a business simulation tool that relies on standard industry conversion metrics to show you what is mathematically possible. It requires enormous effort on your end.
Landing.faq2A: Currently, we support detailed simulations for YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and X (Twitter).
Landing.faq3A: They are based on industry benchmarks for conversion rates, standard RPMs, and average sponsorship deals. While accurate structurally, individual performance will always vary.
Landing.faq4A: Yes, instantly from your dashboard settings. No questions asked.

Dashboard.upgradeToPro: Upgrade to Pro to unlock advanced AI insights.

Simulator.title: Revenue Simulator
Simulator.desc: Calculate your future revenue across three growth scenarios based on mathematical projections.
Simulator.emptyState: Fill out the form and run a simulation to see your mathematical revenue projections.
Simulator.toastLimitDesc: Showing 3 months. Upgrade to Pro for 12 months projections.
